message:
feat(ndarray): add shape/stride conformance cases and coverage_ratio improvements

Expand the ndarray conformance surface with shape and stride test cases
and improve reliability reporting for the RaptorQ gate.

- Add 71 lines of shape_stride_cases.json fixtures covering contiguous,
  transposed, sliced, broadcasted, and zero-stride arrays
- Add conformance harness support for shape/stride case loading and
  validation in fnp-conformance/src/lib.rs
- Add shape/stride operations and test infrastructure in fnp-ndarray
  including contiguity checks and stride computation helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
